'''鈭歾-l-j-m''' ('''kazaljemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyberattack|cyberattack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-j-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyberattack|cyberattack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-l-j-m
|-
! Lemma
| kazaljemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizaljemoko|thizaljemoko]] || [[word:jizaljemoko|jizaljemoko]] || [[word:shizaljemoko|shizaljemoko]] || [[word:kizaljemoko|kizaljemoko]]
|-
